title: Pre-reg iteration 3: multi-task LSTM/FNO on 5 US assets
diagnostic: LSTM single-task H1=+0.40, H2=-0.22 (sign flipped). Multi-task LSTM on 5 US: H1=+0.30, H2=+0.34 (BOTH POSITIVE on all 5 US).

fno_medium_multi_task_5_us.H2: most are near zero or negative (NOT robust)

key_finding: Multi-task LSTM on 5 US assets is the ROBUST approach: H1 and H2 are BOTH positive on all 5 US assets. This was not visible in single-task because the single-task models overfit to GFC-era vol. Multi-task training adds more data per epoch and reduces overfitting.
